title.rendered: Staff Nurse- OT (female) Job in Kerala

content.rendered:
Experience: Minimum 1 year

Job Description:

Candidates having OT experience with treating patients, administering medication, maintaining patient records, diagnosing and testing patients and operating medical equipment. Must providing highest care to the patient, empathy and good communication and also to maintain confidentiality.

Requirements:

  • GNM/BSc nurses with minimum 1 year experience can apply for this job
  • Working experience in NABH hospital is an added advantage.
  • Should have a valid Kerala Nurses Registration
  • Immediate joiners preferred
